summary: Iteration 39 - Clear All Transactions and Credit Card Benefits Features Testing: All 11 backend tests passed. Both features fully functional. Fixed minor icon issue in BenefitsSection component.

design_issues.issue: Invalid icon name 'sparkles' for MaterialCommunityIcons - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/clear-all-transactions endpoint correctly clears transactions, CC transactions, bank accounts, journal entries, and statement hashes
GET /api/credit-cards/all-benefits returns all user cards with cached benefits status
GET /api/credit-cards/{card_id}/benefits fetches AI-generated benefits using GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
Benefits are cached in card_benefits_cache collection to avoid repeated AI calls
Clear All Transactions button visible in Settings > Banking > Data Management section with proper warning text
Benefits tab visible in Credit Cards screen tab bar with expand/collapse cards, Fetch Benefits with AI button, and AI disclaimer

verified_elements: Data Management section with red delete icon
Description text: 'Clear all imported transactions to start fresh. Useful if you want to re-upload corrected bank statements.'
Tab bar with: My Cards, Benefits, Dues, Rewards, Interest, Best Card
Benefits tab clickable and shows BenefitsSection
Summary card with Total Limit, Outstanding, Available
Credit cards listed with expand/collapse chevrons
Fetch Benefits with AI button for cards without cached benefits
Benefit count badge for cards with cached benefits
AI disclaimer at bottom: 'Benefits information is AI-generated and pulled from the web where applicable...'

bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed 'sparkles' to 'auto-fix' which is a valid MaterialCommunityIcons name

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clear All Transactions and Credit Card Benefits features fully tested and working. Demo user has 3 HDFC Regalia credit cards. One card (HDFC HDFC Regalia **** 1234) has 7 cached benefits. The clear-all endpoint was tested and cleared all transactions - demo user now has 0 transactions, 0 bank accounts. Benefits API uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key.
